steps.t: Elrond can be found in his library in the Last Homely House. You should talk to Elrond.
Lothrandir can be found outside the village of Sûri-kylä in Forochel. You should find Lothrandir and explain Elrond's request.
Lothrandir is with the shade of Arvedui at the shipwreck of the Thoroval. You should talk to Lothrandir.
